prompt: I'm building a new Axum web app and I want to add authentication. I need email/password login, passkeys, and MFA. My database is at postgres://myapp:secret@db.internal:5432/myapp. Can you set up yauth for me? I want the auth routes at /api/auth and I need a protected /api/me endpoint that returns the current user.

assertions.text: Cargo.toml includes yauth with email-password, passkey, and mfa features
Code creates a database pool and runs migrations
YAuthBuilder is configured with EmailPasswordConfig, PasskeyConfig, and MfaConfig
Auth routes are nested under /api/auth using .nest()
A protected /api/me route uses auth_middleware and extracts Extension<AuthUser>
YAuthConfig includes base_url, session settings, and trusted_origins
